message:
fix(security): credential redaction, RBAC hole, path traversal, and secret detection

Address multiple security concerns across the crate:

Credential redaction (config.rs):
- Add redact_db_url() that strips credentials from database URLs before
  logging (e.g., postgres://user:pass@host/db → postgres://****@host/db)
- Apply redaction in both Debug output and the startup bootstrap banner

RBAC fix (server/lib.rs):
- Remove the `|| roles.is_empty()` fallback that was granting writer
  privileges to requests with no roles, meaning unauthenticated requests
  silently got writer access
- Fix IPv6 loopback detection: change v6.to_ipv4() to
  v6.to_ipv4_mapped() to avoid incorrectly matching IPv4-compatible
  addresses in the ::/96 range as loopback

Path traversal prevention (storage/lib.rs):
- emit_notification_signal(), clear_notification_signal(), and
  list_pending_signals() now reject project_slug and agent_name
  containing /, \, or .. to prevent writing/reading outside the signals
  directory

Guard path normalization (guard/lib.rs):
- normalize_path() now collapses .. segments and strips ./ prefixes,
  preventing path traversal attacks from bypassing guard path-conflict
  checks (e.g., foo/../bar/secret previously would not match bar/secret)

Secret detection (scrub.rs):
- Add 5 new regex patterns: AWS access key IDs (AKIA...), PEM private
  key headers, Anthropic API keys (sk-ant-...), GitLab tokens (glpat-...)

Bundle verification (crypto.rs):
- Return key_source field ("explicit" vs "embedded" vs null) so callers
  can distinguish trusted verification from self-signed verification
- Add early-return error when SRI-referenced files are missing instead
  of silently skipping them

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -25,12 +25,25 @@ const ATTACHMENT_REDACT_KEYS: &[&str] = &[
 /// Compiled secret-detection regexes (built once, reused).
 static SECRET_PATTERNS: LazyLock<Vec<Regex>> = LazyLock::new(|| {
     vec![
+        // GitHub tokens
         Regex::new(r"(?i)ghp_[A-Za-z0-9]{36,}").unwrap(),
         Regex::new(r"(?i)github_pat_[A-Za-z0-9_]{20,}").unwrap(),
+        // Slack tokens
         Regex::new(r"(?i)xox[baprs]-[A-Za-z0-9\-]{10,}").unwrap(),
+        // OpenAI / generic sk- keys
         Regex::new(r"(?i)sk-[A-Za-z0-9]{20,}").unwrap(),
+        // Bearer tokens
         Regex::new(r"(?i)bearer\s+[A-Za-z0-9_\-\.]{16,}").unwrap(),
+        // JWTs (three base64url segments)
         Regex::new(r"eyJ[0-9A-Za-z_-]+\.[0-9A-Za-z_-]+\.[0-9A-Za-z_-]+").unwrap(),
+        // AWS access key IDs (always start with AKIA)
+        Regex::new(r"AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}").unwrap(),
+        // PEM private keys
+        Regex::new(r"-----BEGIN[A-Z ]* PRIVATE KEY-----").unwrap(),
+        // Anthropic API keys
+        Regex::new(r"(?i)sk-ant-[A-Za-z0-9\-]{20,}").unwrap(),
+        // GitLab tokens
+        Regex::new(r"glpat-[A-Za-z0-9\-_]{20,}").unwrap(),
     ]
 });
